phases: Phase 1: dod_record + dod_check + skill wiring + doctrine + tests

limitations: V1 ships plan-emission + structural substantiate check (Step 4.6.7); WARN-only; enforces declaration presence + waiver rationale, NOT empirical truth (D4 test-name to pytest-output cross-reference deferred to V2); new ## Definition of Done section in /qor-plan; forward-only (no retrofit of prior plans)
non_goals: D4 empirical-execution check (V2); ledger SESSION SEAL body D-tier status block (V2); /qor-ideate integration (V2); retroactive DoD section in prior sealed plans; schema-level validation beyond field presence
exclusions: no changes to /qor-implement (V1 does not record D4 test-author intent at implement time); existing ## Step Prerequisites Phase 75 block untouched; no new CI workflow
